title: /admin UI: Upgrade panel with current sha, latest sha, button, and live log
userStory: As Steve, I want a single panel on /admin that shows whether an upgrade is available and lets me apply it with one click.
acceptanceCriteria: Panel shows: current running commit (short sha + commit message + age), latest available commit on origin/main (resolved server-side via `git ls-remote` cached for 60s), 'Up to date' or 'Upgrade available' badge
'Deploy now' button is disabled when up to date or when a run is in flight; shows the in-flight run_id and tail when one exists
On click: POSTs to /api/admin/deploy, opens the SSE stream from US-002, renders log lines in a scrolling pre block, replaces button with a 'Deploying...' spinner
On completion: badge flips to success/failed, button re-enables only if a new commit is now available, current sha refreshes
Confirmation modal before triggering ('This will restart all services. Continue?') because the deploy is brief but disruptive
Verify: with origin/main ahead of the running sha, panel shows 'Upgrade available', click streams the deploy log to completion, badge flips to success, current sha updates

references.name: Coolify Deploy panel
references.what: Reference UI for: current sha vs available, status badges, scrolling log block, confirmation modal.

references.name: OpenClaw upgrade UI
references.what: Reference for: layout decisions and disabled-button states during in-flight runs.
